have h₁ : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + 1 := by
    have h₂ : M ∆ E(P) = (M \ E(P)) ∪ (E(P) \ M) := by
      simp [symmDiff]
      <;>
      simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;>
      tauto
    rw [h₂]
    have h₃ : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (E(P) \ M) := by
      have h₄ : (M \ E(P)) ∩ (E(P) \ M) = ∅ := by
        apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_diff] at hx
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try simp_all) <;>
        (try aesop)
      rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
      exact h₄
    have h₄ : (M \ E(P)).encard = M.encard := by
      have h₅ : M \ E(P) = M := by
        apply Set.Subset.antisymm
        · exact Set.diff_subset
        · intro e he
          have h₆ : e ∈ M := he
          have h₇ : ∀ (e : β), e ∈ M → e ∉ E(P) := by
            intro e he
            have h₈ := h.eDisjointM e
            simp_all [Set.mem_diff]
            <;>
            aesop
          have h₉ := h₇ e he
          simp_all [Set.mem_diff]
          <;>
          aesop
      rw [h₅]
    have h₅ : (E(P) \ M).encard = 1 := by
      have h₆ : E(P) \ M = {P.headEdge} := by
        have h₇ := h
        cases P with
        | nil _ =>
          exfalso
          simp_all [IsAugPath.isNonempty]
          <;>
          aesop
        | cons x e P =>
          simp_all [WList.E_cons, Set.diff_eq_empty_iff_subset, Set.subset_def]
          <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try
            {
              by_cases h₈ : e ∈ M <;>
              by_cases h₉ : P = nil <;>
              simp_all [h₈, h₉, WList.E_cons, WList.cons_ne_nil] <;>
              (try { contradiction }) <;>
              (try { aesop })
            }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₁₀ := hM.subsingleton_inc e
            have h₁₁ := hM.subsingleton_inc e
            simp_all [hM.subsingleton_inc]
          })
      rw [h₆]
      <;>
      simp [encard_singleton]
    have h₆ : ((M \ E(P)) ∪ (E(P) \ M)).encard = (M \ E(P)).encard + (E(P) \ M).encard := by
      rw [encard_union_eq]
      <;> simp_all [h₃]
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₆]
    <;> simp_all [h₄, h₅]
    <;> norm_num
  exact h₁
₃

  exact h₁
